hero.presentation: Analyst Developer at ITS4U, currently on mission at BIL. Passionate about new technologies and finance, I mainly work with Java and Spring Boot, and enjoy building front-end projects with React, TypeScript and Tailwind on the side. I love working in a team and discovering new things.

projects.title: Personal Projects
projects.description: A few public projects I built in my spare time.
projects.privateNote: I also have many private projects and work from my studies that I don't showcase here.

amarokeInsights.description: Personal educational website about finance, banking concepts, investments (stocks, ETFs, bonds), crypto and trading basics, with interactive calculation tools.

milkLinks.description: Web application centralizing useful links for the game Milky Way Idle: expansions, strategy guides and community-created tools.

charadle.description: Wordle-inspired web game where you guess an anime or manga character from the character's image displayed on screen.
